properties.tree_description:
It is a very tall pine with some branches only at the top. Several years ago, it’s ‘sister’ tree fell and landed on three of our roofs and damaged a car as well. This pine tree has very shallow roots and is on an eroded hill, e.g. little dirt. We don’t want to get into the same disaster as when it fell the last time. Reason for Removal:Dying treeComments:It is a very tall pine with some branches only at the top. Several years ago, it’s ‘sister’ tree fell and landed on three of our roofs and damaged a car as well. This pine tree has very shallow roots and is on an eroded hill, e.g. little dirt. We don’t want to get into the same disaster as when it fell the last time.
